claims.statement: Patch benchmark schema v10 and matrix schema v4 add complete-cell coalesced count, exact-byte traffic and fallback telemetry while retaining prior parser, callback, action, batching, relationship, staged CRC, compression CPU and raw-copy evidence fields.

On this machine and the recorded one-million-cell level-1 targeted-upsert workloads, complete-cell coalescing reduced total editor median by 51.18% for numeric, 33.13% for mixed-inline and 25.85% for formula plus external hyperlink while median process peak working set changed by less than 0.03 MB.

The optimized profiles coalesced at least 999982 of one million source cells with at most 18 boundary or metadata fallbacks; all representative outputs opened with openpyxl 3.1.5 and the formula profile preserved https://example.com/fastxlsx-benchmark.

Production and stored-only CTest passed 132/132; no-images runtime and production/stored/no-images install-consumer profiles passed. Office was not run, and no cross-machine, arbitrary-workbook, full-feature or OpenXLSX-superiority claim is made.
